name: Pipe Connect
description: Rotate pipe pieces to connect water flow from source to drain. Dark industrial puzzle with satisfying animations.

contributions.Elanor Brightloom: UI layout, dark industrial color palette (#111318 dark steel, #00d4ff electric cyan, #39ff14 source, #ff6b35 drain), grid CSS with 72px cells, HUD design with level/move counter, solved banner animation
contributions.Míriel Goldthread: Steampunk-lite visual theme, snap-rotate animation with cubic-bezier overshoot, sequential water flow pulse animation with 0.08s delays, red pulse flash on disconnected pipes, staggered level transition animations, droplet particles at drain
contributions.Narvi Irondeep: Game logic review — BFS flood-fill pathfinding, cycle detection, isolated pipe island handling, win condition after animation, source/drain lock, T-junction multi-direction checks, 3-tier difficulty progression (4x4 Easy / 6x6 Medium / 8x8 Hard)

builtBy: Novalystrix with Elanor, Míriel, and Narvi
